function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, read nested AGENTS in finance lane, and used exact invoice line-item values.
function.outcome_justification: The exact line item 'workflow mapping and intake audit' appears in three invoices issued on 2025-12-18, 2026-01-19, and 2026-03-20 with line_eur 520, 260, and 420 respectively; all are since the beginning of December 2025. Total = 1200.
